title: paeonia × suffruticosa f. banksii
intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa f. banksii, also known as Peony, is a flowering plant hybrid belonging to the genus Paeonia, which is a cross between Paeonia lactiflora and Paeonia suffruticosa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Chinese and Japanese herbalism, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia × suffruticosa f. banksii include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, among others. Paeonia × suffruticosa f. banksii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
